description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of advanced HTML5 semantic elements, testing the ability to differentiate and correctly use tags beyond basic <div> and <span>. It is moderately challenging, presented in a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges learners toward best practices. The content is aimed at developers who want to validate and improve their semantic HTML skills.
Topics: HTML5 semantic tags, proper element usage, accessibility considerations, modern web standards
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and students with basic HTML experience seeking to deepen their understanding of semantic markup.
